description: You are a DevOps Engineer at a SaaS company. The development team needs a local hot-reload environment for the Inventory API service located in `~/projects/inventory-service`. Currently, they have to rebuild the image for every code change. Enable hot-reloading by creating a `docker-compose.override.yml` file in the project directory. The override must mount the local `./app` directory to `/app` inside the container, expose port 5000 to the host, set the `FLASK_DEBUG` environment variable to 1, and override the container command to `flask run --host=0.0.0.0`. Do not modify the existing `docker-compose.yml` or `Dockerfile` as they are used for production CI/CD.
